globalAttributes.name: hx-get
globalAttributes.description: Issue a GET request to the given URL and swap the response into the current page.

globalAttributes.name: hx-post
globalAttributes.description: Issue a POST request to the given URL and swap the response into the current page.

globalAttributes.name: hx-put
globalAttributes.description: Issue a PUT request to the given URL and swap the response into the current page.

globalAttributes.name: hx-patch
globalAttributes.description: Issue a PATCH request to the given URL and swap the response into the current page.

globalAttributes.name: hx-delete
globalAttributes.description: Issue a DELETE request to the given URL and swap the response into the current page.

globalAttributes.name: hx-target
globalAttributes.description: Select the element that will receive the swapped response.

globalAttributes.name: hx-swap
globalAttributes.description: Control how the response HTML is swapped into the target.

globalAttributes.name: hx-trigger
globalAttributes.description: Define which event or condition triggers the HTMX request.

globalAttributes.name: hx-include
globalAttributes.description: Include additional element values in the request payload.

globalAttributes.name: hx-vals
globalAttributes.description: Add extra values to the request payload.

globalAttributes.name: hx-headers
globalAttributes.description: Add request headers to the HTMX request.

globalAttributes.name: hx-boost
globalAttributes.description: Upgrade anchors and forms to use HTMX AJAX requests.

globalAttributes.name: hx-push-url
globalAttributes.description: Push the fetched URL into browser history.

globalAttributes.name: hx-select
globalAttributes.description: Select a subset of the response before swapping it into the target.

globalAttributes.name: hx-select-oob
globalAttributes.description: Swap matching response fragments out of band.

globalAttributes.name: hx-swap-oob
globalAttributes.description: Swap an element from the response out of band.

globalAttributes.name: hx-confirm
globalAttributes.description: Show a confirmation dialog before issuing the request.

globalAttributes.name: hx-disabled-elt
globalAttributes.description: Disable matched elements while the request is in flight.

globalAttributes.name: hx-indicator
globalAttributes.description: Toggle a loading indicator while the request is in flight.

globalAttributes.name: hx-params
globalAttributes.description: Filter which parameters are submitted with the request.

globalAttributes.name: hx-preserve
globalAttributes.description: Preserve an element across swaps.

globalAttributes.name: hx-replace-url
globalAttributes.description: Replace the current history entry with the fetched URL.

globalAttributes.name: hx-request
globalAttributes.description: Configure request options such as timeout and credentials.

globalAttributes.name: hx-sync
globalAttributes.description: Synchronize multiple elements making HTMX requests.

globalAttributes.name: hx-history
globalAttributes.description: Control whether the current page is stored in HTMX history.

globalAttributes.name: hx-history-elt
globalAttributes.description: Mark the element whose state should be saved for history restoration.

globalAttributes.name: hx-on
globalAttributes.description: Inline event listener syntax for HTMX lifecycle or DOM events.

globalAttributes.name: hx-ext
globalAttributes.description: Enable one or more HTMX extensions for the element subtree.

globalAttributes.name: x-data
globalAttributes.description: Define an Alpine.js component state object for the element.

globalAttributes.name: x-init
globalAttributes.description: Run an expression when the Alpine.js component initializes.

globalAttributes.name: x-show
globalAttributes.description: Toggle element visibility based on an Alpine.js expression.

globalAttributes.name: x-bind
globalAttributes.description: Bind one or more attributes to Alpine.js expressions.

globalAttributes.name: x-on
globalAttributes.description: Listen for DOM events and run an Alpine.js expression.

globalAttributes.name: x-text
globalAttributes.description: Set the element text content from an Alpine.js expression.

globalAttributes.name: x-html
globalAttributes.description: Set the element HTML content from an Alpine.js expression.

globalAttributes.name: x-model
globalAttributes.description: Create two-way binding between form controls and Alpine.js state.

globalAttributes.name: x-modelable
globalAttributes.description: Expose internal Alpine.js state for parent x-model bindings.

globalAttributes.name: x-for
globalAttributes.description: Repeat a template for each item in a collection.

globalAttributes.name: x-if
globalAttributes.description: Conditionally render a template fragment.

globalAttributes.name: x-ref
globalAttributes.description: Register a reference name that can be accessed from Alpine.js.

globalAttributes.name: x-cloak
globalAttributes.description: Hide an element until Alpine.js finishes initializing.

globalAttributes.name: x-ignore
globalAttributes.description: Tell Alpine.js to skip DOM initialization for the element subtree.

globalAttributes.name: x-effect
globalAttributes.description: Run a reactive side effect whenever referenced state changes.

globalAttributes.name: x-id
globalAttributes.description: Generate stable unique IDs for use inside a component.

globalAttributes.name: x-teleport
globalAttributes.description: Render a template into another part of the DOM.

globalAttributes.name: x-transition
globalAttributes.description: Apply Alpine.js transition classes when visibility changes.

values.name: innerHTML
values.description: Replace the target element inner HTML.

values.name: textContent
values.description: Replace the target text content without parsing HTML.

values.name: beforebegin
values.description: Insert the response before the target element.

values.name: afterbegin
values.description: Insert the response before the first child.

values.name: beforeend
values.description: Insert the response after the last child.

values.name: afterend
values.description: Insert the response after the target element.

values.name: delete
values.description: Delete the target element regardless of the response.

values.name: none
values.description: Do not insert response content into the target.
